raw_consumer_statement:
These people denied my dispute when someone hacked me and spent XXXX dollars of my money. When disputed they tell me I verified that the card was in my position. When i got the text for the verification I clicked " 2 '' which meant it wasn't me. They denied dispute telling me i clicked " 1 ''. I don't know who or what the merchant is supposed to be or do. When I initially called to dispute I let them know that all my accounts were hacked and they do not think once that i may have been sim swapped. 

This cards XXXX fraud liability is the biggest joke ever. They do everything in their power not to give your money back that was fraudulently used. 

My request is the charge to be removed from my account ASAP or I will cease to use Barclay ever again. This is very ridicules that I have to go to this length the save myself.
